Light-curing Baseplates for making individual customised impression trays and functional trays. Can be used chairside to make accurate bases for bite registration and wax try-ins. Each box contains 50 plates. High dimensional stability with very low shrinkage Soft consistency, excellent malleability and adaptation to model. Long shelf life and storability.

G-Wax Dental Modelling Wax has high temperature stability and offers a more accurate try and less risk of distortion in the mouth.  Sheets of Modelling Wax are used by the technician to create the preliminary denture base that the dentist will try on in the patient's mouth.

A fast and effective solution for impression trays, instruments, and accessories. G-Clean gently dissolves alginate and plaster residues without scratching or sanding. Simply soak for 15-30 minutes, rinse with running water, and your trays will be spotless and ready to use. Discover easy cleaning with G-Clean!

G-Dent Liner is a light-curing, compomer liner composed of polyacid-modified composite resins and glass ionomer fillers. Its formulation allows for slight expansion, partially compensating for the polymerization shrinkage of composite materials. The glass ionomer content enhances adhesion to dentin, doubling its bonding strength.

Self-Curing, Eugenol Free Temporary Filling Material Temp Fill is a self-curing, eugenol-free, bioinert temporary filling made from zinc oxide and synthetic resins.  It hardens upon contact with oral moisture and provides reliable sealing with easy application. Excellent retention and easy handling Medium hardness after setting, ensuring easy removal Ready to use, no mixing required
